campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 19, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they discussed staffing vacancies and the city's efforts to recruit and retain employees. The council also addressed public hearing matters and noted that the Boogie Festival is happening this weekend.
keyTopics: Staffing vacancies and recruitment/retention efforts
Public hearing on government code section 3502
Boogie Festival this weekend
Council reports and public comments

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — May 6, 2026
saratoga.summary: The Saratoga City Council approved an engineer's report and moved forward with a hearing process for what appears to be a municipal improvement project. The council also discussed becoming a charter city and reviewed potential tax and revenue options.
keyTopics: Engineer's Report approval for fiscal year project
Public hearing scheduled for improvement district or assessment
Ordinance adoption set for May 20, 2026 meeting
Charter city status discussion and direction to staff
Preliminary tax and revenue options being evaluated

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve financial records and meeting minutes, review the town's March finances, and authorize several contracts and agreements. The council also approved a list of projects for the 2026-2027 fiscal year and considered grant applications.
keyTopics: Approved March 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized road paving contract with O'Grady Paving
Accepted donation of automated external defibrillator (AED)
Approved new fiscal year 2026-27 project list
Authorized grant applications for statewide funding

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agendas and update work plans for city committees. The council cancelled the May 26 meeting and reviewed items for the June 2 draft agenda, while also updating work plans for neighborhood services, education, and government operations.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26, 2026 City Council meeting
June 2, 2026 draft agenda review and new items
Updated Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan
Updated Rules and Open Government Committee work plan
Approval of various events sponsored by council districts

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the upcoming fiscal year. The council also reviewed agendas and reports from various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee member selection for 2026-27 fiscal year
Public comment period for residents
City council meeting minutes approval
Board and commission agenda planning

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a budget workshop to review the city's spending plan for fiscal year 2026/27. Residents had the opportunity to speak publicly and share their feedback on the proposed budget before the council makes final decisions.
keyTopics: FY 2026/27 recommended budget available for public review online
Public comment period on budget priorities and spending plans
Budget workshop discussion and council decisions

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety plan for the next 15 years and celebrated Public Works Week by recognizing the city's public works teams. The council also acknowledged Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Health and Safety Element update for the 2015-2040 General Plan
Recognition of Public Works Department divisions (roads, trees, facilities, sustainability)
Asian American Pacific Islander Month celebration
Some agenda items were postponed to a future meeting

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss plans related to the station area. The meeting was open to the public both in person and online via Zoom.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting convened
Meeting held at City Hall Council Chambers (1500 Warburton Avenue)
Public participation available in-person and via Zoom

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they passed several land development approvals, introduced new city regulations, and appointed a permanent City Manager. The council conducted public hearings on zoning and assessment matters before voting on these items.
keyTopics: Appointed a permanent City Manager
Approved a site development permit and tentative map amendment for a development project
Introduced and adopted new city ordinances
Confirmed property assessments related to city improvements

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The City Council discussed plans to help Palo Alto residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles for electrification programs designed to help the city meet air quality regulations set by the regional Air District.
keyTopics: Residential electrification programs to replace gas appliances with electric alternatives
City compliance strategy for regional air quality regulations
Proposed guiding principles for how electrification assistance programs should work
